name: Ryan Dunn
title: Last known photo of Ryan Dunn, taken on June 20, 2011, at a bar hours before his fatal car crash.
description: Ryan Dunn posted these photos to his Twitter account on the night of June 20, 2011, taken at Barnaby's of America, a bar in West Chester, Pennsylvania. He had been drinking with friends for roughly four hours, consuming at least three beers and three shots. Witnesses described him as glassy-eyed and flushed. Around 2:38 AM, Dunn left the bar in his Porsche 911 GT3 with passenger Zachary Hartwell, 30, intending to drop Hartwell at his home before meeting another friend. On Route 322 in West Goshen Township, Dunn lost control at an estimated 130 mph. The car jumped a guardrail, went through a wooded area, and burst into flames. Both Dunn and Hartwell were killed. His blood alcohol level was later found to be more than twice the legal limit. He was 34 years old. His Jackass castmate Bam Margera was devastated by the loss.
bio: Ryan Dunn was an American stunt performer, television personality, and actor best known as a member of the "Jackass" crew. His daring stunts and humor made him a fan favorite on the show.
